title: gladiolus lundaensis
intro: Gladiolus lundaensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Iridaceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various ailments due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant has been found to have health benefits, including the ability to reduce fever and alleviate pain, as well as to be used as a treatment for wounds and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Gladiolus lundaensis may include infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
